description: Intentional same-form / cross-English homographs. Most collisions are bugs (e.g. ELIF: ["else"]). Only list genuine native words that match another logical's English emit, after native-speaker review.
howToUse: Each entry: pack slug, form (lowercase), logicals allowed to use it, note. Validation in scripts/validate.mjs reads this file. Prefer distinct phrases when possible; allowlist is the exception path.

entries.note: Afrikaans 'as' means if; TypeScript/JS 'as' cast stays AS until a distinct Afrikaans cast gloss exists
isiXhosa 'into' means thing (nullish placeholder); SQL INTO remains English until a distinct gloss exists
Yorùbá 'fun' means for/to; coincides with Kotlin 'fun' (FUNCTION) but is the FOR gloss
Efik 'na' used for FOR; casefolds against R 'NA' (R_NA) but is not that token's pack form
